issues.info: If you find any bugs, or have any feature requests, please post them on this github!

enable.name: Enable
enable.description: Enables the mod's functionality. Disabling this is essentially a soft toggle without having to restart your game.

CopyPlus.name: Copy+ Button
CopyPlus.description: Adds the Copy+ button, which allows you to pick and choose which attributes to copy!

unlocked.name: Only Unlocked
unlocked.description: When enabled, only unlocked icons and colors will be copied!

copySelf.name: Enable on Own Profile
copySelf.description: Enable copy buttons on your own profile

updateProfile.name: Update Icons on Profile
updateProfile.description: Updates the icons on your profile whenever you copy icons! You must refresh your profile for your icons to update on the servers!
